objective: Add a root-hygiene classifier and require root_surface_tidy delivery-truth to cite current root classification evidence.
deepModuleBoundary: src/lib/root-hygiene/** production classifier module with non-path repository identity binding, module-private verifier-owned runtime report tokens, frozen report graphs, and split entry-classification/report-freeze seams plus narrow src/lib/delivery-truth/** trust-policy fixtures for root_surface_tidy.

planAlignmentRef.decision: PU-011 owns production root hygiene classification and root_surface_tidy claim-support proof without moving or deleting root artifacts.

automationPlan.proof: root-hygiene-classification/v1 emits classed root entries and delivery-truth trusts only current verifier-produced classifier evidence
intent reviewed before implementation with non-empty artifact-first reports and expected WROTE lines
acceptance map and slice receipt before PR handoff

missing, stale, loose document-only, untrusted, unclassified, legacy-drift, post-token mutation, direct-import-forged, digest-consistent copied, missing repository identity, and cross-repository replayed root hygiene evidence blocks root_surface_tidy

requiredFreshnessGate: expected=05602c0b475b4b714edfd852fda66af2728a1d8f; local_sha=$(git rev-parse codex/jsc-363-runtime-evidence-pu010); remote_sha=$(git ls-remote origin refs/heads/codex/jsc-363-runtime-evidence-pu010 | awk '{print $1}'); test "$local_sha" = "$expected" && test "$remote_sha" = "$expected"
